page_title: 80% Polyester 20% Stainless Steel Knit Fabric - ArShirt EMK - Ariteks
spec_line: 220 g/m², 80% Polyester 20% Stainless Steel, EMI shielding, pique knit fabric. 80% Polyester 20% Stainless Steel emi shielding pique knit fabric
description_blocks: ArShirt EMK fabrics can be used as emi shileding for walls and baby cloth by reducing all kind of elecrectromagneic waves.
Another application is conductive clothing for live line workers, anti-radar applications for military cages, ani-stress, and pain reducer bandages.
ArShirt EMK is certfied as 60895 for line workers clothing.

technical_documents.context_text: Technical Parameters Fiber 80% Polyester (CO) 20% Stainless Steel (MTF) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 40/2 Ne Combed EN ISO 2060 Weight 220 ±15 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1800 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Bursting strength > 1500 kPa(kN/m² ) EN ISO 13938-1 Dimensional Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 2-3 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 2-3 EN ISO 105 N01 Peroxide Fastness 3-4 EN ISO 105 N02 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 Light Fastness 4 EN ISO 105 B02 Perspiration Light Fast. 2-3 EN ISO 105 B07 pH 4.0-9.0 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. 220 g/m² , 80% Polyester 20% Stainless Steel, EMI shielding, pique knit fabric.

80% Polyester 20% Stainless Steel emi shielding pique knit fabric. ArShirt EMK fabrics can be used as emi shileding for walls and baby cloth by reducing all kind of elecrectromagneic waves. Another application is conductive clothing for live line workers, anti-radar applications for military cages, ani-stress, and pain reducer bandages. ArShirt EMK is certfied as 60895 for line workers clothing. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Faraday Cage Suits Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Line Workers Done IEC 60895 Technical Documents >> ArShirt EMK Data Sheet Certificates

ArShirt EMK fabrics can be used as emi shileding for walls and baby cloth by reducing all kind of elecrectromagneic waves.
Another application is conductive clothing for live line workers, anti-radar applications for military cages, ani-stress, and pain reducer bandages.
ArShirt EMK is certfied as 60895 for line workers clothing.
